data.title: What's Going On With Archer Aviation (ACHR) Stock?
data.description: Archer Aviation shares are trading higher by 10.7% during Friday's session. The company recently partnered with Anduril for defense VTOLs, raised $430 million and expanded eVTOL efforts.

data.title: How Is The Market Feeling About Interactive Strength?
'Sticky Inflation' Appears 'Less Stuck' After November Consumer Price Data, Expert Says
data.description: Economists are weighing in on November's cool PCE data and what it could mean for the Federal Reserve and markets heading into 2025.

data.title: Palantir Defies Gravity: Army Deal, Nasdaq 100 Spotlight Fuel Rally
data.description: Palantir's contract extension with the U.S. Army and inclusion in Nasdaq 100 has caused its stock to soar. Its AI and data solutions are proving invaluable for military operations.

data.title: Why Is Small Cap Galectin Therapeutics Stock Trading Lower On Friday?
data.description: Galectin Therapeutics' NAVIGATE trial shows belapectin reduces varices in MASH cirrhosis, but falls short of statistical targets; full data due in early 2025.
